basic_details.job_title: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Eng Trainee and Hostel Assistant Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Eng. Trainee (Male) and Hostel Assistant Manager
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 3 Eng. Trainee (Male) and Hostel Assistant Manager Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official NIT Trichy website. The last date to submit the application form is 19-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B. Tech, Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline
qualification.details: Eng. Trainee (Male): B.E / B. Tech with minimum 03 years relevant experience. Desirable: B.E/B.Tech (Electrical), experience in electrical maintenance, LT/HT systems, transformers, DG sets, UPS, power distribution, electrical safety standards, AutoCAD, supervision and good communication skills. Hostel Assistant Manager: Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline with minimum 01 year relevant experience. Desirable: Knowledge of student care, hostel operations, documentation, record-keeping, typing, MS Office and good communication skills.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per minimum wages Act - Skilled category
salary_details.details: Eng. Trainee (Male): As per minimum wages Act - Skilled category Hostel Assistant Manager: As per minimum wages Act - Skilled category

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Trichy to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Trichy Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Trichy Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.national_institute_of_technology_tiruchi: Eng. Trainee (Male) and Hostel Assistant Manager

B.E / B. Tech, Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Trichy Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Trichy Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Eng. Trainee (Male): B.E / B. Tech with minimum 03 years relevant experience. Desirable: B.E/B.Tech (Electrical), experience in electrical maintenance, LT/HT systems, transformers, DG sets, UPS, power distribution, electrical safety standards, AutoCAD, supervision and good communication skills. Hostel Assistant Manager: Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline with minimum 01 year relevant experience. Desirable: Knowledge of student care, hostel operations, documentation, record-keeping, typing, MS Office and good communication skills.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Eng. Trainee (Male): As per minimum wages Act - Skilled category Hostel Assistant Manager: As per minimum wages Act - Skilled category

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Trichy to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Trichy recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the NIT Trichy recruitment is 19-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Eng. Trainee (Male) and Hostel Assistant Manager.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Trichy recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Online.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum qualifications required for Eng. Trainee (Male)?
faq.answer: A B.E / B. Tech degree with a minimum of 03 years of relevant experience is required for the Eng. Trainee (Male) post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification for Hostel Assistant Manager?
faq.answer: A Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline with a minimum of 01 year of relevant experience is required for the Hostel Assistant Manager post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NIT Trichy recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will be as per the Minimum Wages Act for the Skilled category.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts is based on Selection / Empanelment.

faq.question: Q10. Which state is NIT Trichy located in?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli is located in Tamil Nadu.
